generated_exposure.exposure_text: Just saw this in my local paper - our NATO allies are still not meeting their 2% spending commitments while expecting us to handle all security risks. Meanwhile, back home, our emergency services are stretched thin. Time to put America first and demand fair burden-sharing. #NationalSecurity #NATO
